The [[Nen-Carvon]] '''R-19 Paraglider''' was a civilian glider which found use by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[Alliance Special Forces/Legends|Special Forces]]. The heavily modified glider was covered in [[reflec]] panels that baffled standard sensors, allowing for infiltrating behind enemy lines. Its augmented [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsorlift]] generator could carry a much heavier load in addition to the pilot, and an added pull-down display visor granted the user night-vision, terrain-following and directional modes. It was also equipped with low power transponders to allow troops to locate each other after landing.

[[Gunman]], a member of the paramilitary unit [[Churhee's Riflemen]], had experience with the gliders.
